title: Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.RequiredPaths
body:
Add AddAndCopyOptions.RequiredPaths (type: []string) // names we require to be in the set of things copied (as a safety check?)

Add --required-path to buildah add and buildah copy

Add integration tests, including testing that --required-path without --include fails

Op_File.Actions.FileAction_Copy.IncludePatterns is a wip.

from #6732
